[Tool call] Write
  path: c:\projects\validade-clean\lib\demo-seed.ts
  contents: /**
 * Demo mode: reset a restaurant to a fixed seed dataset.
 * Used when user clicks "Ver demonstração" so every visit sees the same data.
 */

import { db } from "@/lib/db";

const DEMO_PIN = "002222";

function addDays(date: Date, days: number): Date {
  const d = new Date(date);
  d.setDate(d.getDate() + days);
  return d;
}

export async function getDemoRestaurantId(): Promise<string | null> {
  const restaurant = await db.restaurant.findUnique({
    where: { pin: DEMO_PIN },
    select: { id: true },
  });
  return restaurant?.id ?? null;
}

/**
 * Resets the demo restaurant (PIN 002222) to a predefined seed.
 * Deletes all batches, events, templates, categories, locations for that restaurant, then inserts seed data.
 */
export async function resetDemoRestaurantData(): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> {
  const restaurant = await db.restaurant.findUnique({
    where: { pin: DEMO_PIN },
    select: { id: true },
  });

  if (!restaurant) {
    return { success: false, error: "Demo restaurant not found" };
  }

  const rid = restaurant.id;

  try {
    // Delete in order to respect FKs: events -> batches; orders -> restaurant; templates/categories/locations referenced by batches
    await db.stockEvent.deleteMany({ where: { restaurantId: rid } });
    await db.productBatch.deleteMany({ where: { restaurantId: rid } });
    await db.supplierOrder.deleteMany({ where: { restaurantId: rid } });
    await db.productTemplate.deleteMany({ where: { restaurantId: rid } });
    await db.category.deleteMany({ where: { restaurantId: rid } });
    await db.location.deleteMany({ where: { restaurantId: rid } });

    const now = new Date();

    // Seed categories (mp = matéria-prima)
    const catFrescos = await db.category.create({
      data: {
        restaurantId: rid,
        name: "Frescos",
        tipo: "mp",
        alertDaysBeforeExpiry: 3,
        warningDaysBeforeExpiry: 5,
      },
    });
    const catCongelados = await db.category.create({
      data: {
        restaurantId: rid,
        name: "Congelados",
        tipo: "mp",
        alertDaysBeforeExpiry: 7,
        warningDaysBeforeExpiry: 14,
      },
    });

    // Seed locations
    const locFrigo = await db.location.create({
      data: { restaurantId: rid, name: "Frigorífico" },
    });
    const locDespensa = await db.location.create({
      data: { restaurantId: rid, name: "Despensa" },
    });

    // Seed product templates
    const tplLeite = await db.productTemplate.create({
      data: {
        restaurantId: rid,
        name: "Leite",
        unit: "un",
        categoryId: catFrescos.id,
        locationId: locFrigo.id,
      },
    });
    const tplFrango = await db.productTemplate.create({
      data: {
        restaurantId: rid,
        name: "Frango",
        unit: "kg",
        categoryId: catFrescos.id,
        locationId: locFrigo.id,
      },
    });
    const tplCamarão = await db.productTemplate.create({
      data: {
        restaurantId: rid,
        name: "Camarão",
        unit: "kg",
        categoryId: catCongelados.id,
        locationId: locFrigo.id,
      },
    });
    const tplArroz = await db.productTemplate.create({
      data: {
        restaurantId: rid,
        name: "Arroz",
        unit: "kg",
        categoryId: catCongelados.id,
        locationId: locDespensa.id,
      },
    });

    // Seed batches: some urgent, some OK
    await db.productBatch.createMany({
      data: [
        {
          restaurantId: rid,
          name: "Leite",
          quantity: 2,
          unit: "un",
          expiryDate: addDays(now, 2),
          tipo: "mp",
          categoryId: catFrescos.id,
          locationId: locFrigo.id,
          initialQuantity: 2,
          remainingQuantity: 2,
          batchState: "OPEN",
        },
        {
          restaurantId: rid,
          name: "Frango",
          quantity: 1.5,
          unit: "kg",
          expiryDate: addDays(now, 5),
          tipo: "mp",
          categoryId: catFrescos.id,
          locationId: locFrigo.id,
          initialQuantity: 1.5,
          remainingQuantity: 1.5,
          batchState: "OPEN",
        },
        {
          restaurantId: rid,
          name: "Camarão",
          quantity: 0.5,
          unit: "kg",
          expiryDate: addDays(now, -1),
          tipo: "mp",
          categoryId: catCongelados.id,
          locationId: locFrigo.id,
          initialQuantity: 0.5,
          remainingQuantity: 0.5,
          batchState: "OPEN",
        },
        {
          restaurantId: rid,
          name: "Arroz",
          quantity: 5,
          unit: "kg",
          expiryDate: addDays(now, 90),
          tipo: "mp",
          categoryId: catCongelados.id,
          locationId: locDespensa.id,
          initialQuantity: 5,
          remainingQuantity: 5,
          batchState: "OPEN",
        },
      ],
    });

    return { success: true };
  } catch (e) {
    console.error("[demo-seed] Reset error:", e);
    return {
      success: false,
      error: e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Unknown error",
    };
  }
}

const DEMO_PIN = "002222";

/**
 * Enter demo mode: reset demo restaurant to seed, create session, set demo cookie.
 * Client should redirect to /hoje after success. No PIN required.
 */
export async function enterDemoMode(): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string; redirect?: string }> {
  try {
    const restaurant = await getRestaurantByPin(DEMO_PIN);
    if (!restaurant) {
      return { success: false, error: "Demo não disponível." };
    }

    const reset = await resetDemoRestaurantData();
    if (!reset.success) {
      return { success: false, error: reset.error ?? "Erro ao preparar demonstração." };
    }

    const sessionToken = await createSession(restaurant.id);
    await setSessionCookie(sessionToken);
    await setDemoCookie();

    return {
      success: true,
      redirect: "/hoje",
    };
  } catch (e) {
    console.error("[enterDemoMode]", e);
    return {
      success: false,
      error: e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Erro ao iniciar demonstração.",
    };
  }
}

- The demo account must reset every time it is accessed
- Always load the same predefined dataset (products, expiration dates, etc.)
- Do NOT persist any changes made by users
- Ensure no data carries over between sessions

- Trigger the existing onboarding tutorial automatically on every demo entry
- Always start from the beginning
- Do not skip based on previous sessions

- Keep demo mode completely separate from real user accounts

  contents: "use client";

import { useTransition } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "@/i18n/navigation";
import { useTranslations } from "next-intl";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { enterDemoMode } from "@/app/actions";

export function DemoEntryButton() {
  const t = useTranslations("home");
  const router = useRouter();
  const [isPending, startTransition] = useTransition();

  function handleDemo() {
    startTransition(async () => {
      const result = await enterDemoMode();
      if (result.success && result.redirect) {
        router.push(result.redirect);
      } else {
        console.error("[DemoEntryButton]", result.error);
      }
    });
  }

  return (
    <Button
      type="button"
      variant="outline"
      size="lg"
      className="w-full border-2 border-red-600 text-red-600 bg-white hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700 hover:border-red-700 dark:bg-background dark:border-red-500 dark:text-red-400 dark:hover:bg-red-950/30 dark:hover:text-red-300 font-medium text-base md:text-lg"
      onClick={handleDemo}
      disabled={isPending}
    >
      {isPending ? t("loading") ?? "..." : t("demoCta")}
    </Button>
  );
}

import { useTransition } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "@/i18n/navigation";
import { useTranslations } from "next-intl";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { enterDemoMode } from "@/app/actions";

export function DemoEntryButton() {
  const t = useTranslations("home");
  const tCommon = useTranslations("common");
  const router = useRouter();
  const [isPending, startTransition] = useTransition();

  function handleDemo() {

      if (result.success && result.redirect) {
        router.push(result.redirect);
      } else {
        console.error("[DemoEntryButton]", result.error);
      }
    });
  }

  return (
    <Button
      type="button"
      variant="outline"
      size="lg"

      onClick={handleDemo}
      disabled={isPending}

[Tool call] Write
  path: c:\projects\validade-clean\lib\demo-client.ts
  contents: /**
 * Client-only demo mode helpers (cookie name and read).
 * Used for "Modo demonstração" label and forcing the onboarding tour.
 */

export const DEMO_COOKIE_NAME = "tecstock_demo";

export function getIsDemoFromCookie(): boolean {
  if (typeof document === "undefined") return false;
  return document.cookie.includes(`${DEMO_COOKIE_NAME}=1`);
}

Resumo do que ficou implementado:

### 1. **Botão "Ver demonstração" na landing**
- **`app/[locale]/page.tsx`**: Botão principal "Entrar na aplicação" e, logo abaixo, o botão "Ver demonstração", ambos no mesmo bloco centralizado.
- **`components/demo-entry-button.tsx`**: Componente cliente que chama a action `enterDemoMode()` e redireciona para `result.redirect`; estilo secundário (fundo claro, borda e texto vermelhos, menos destaque que o principal).
- **Traduções**: `home.demoCta` em `messages/pt-PT.json` ("Ver demonstração") e `messages/en.json` ("View demo").

### 2. **No-op em modo demo em todas as mutations**
Em **`app/actions.ts`** foi adicionado `if (await getIsDemoSession()) return { ... };` (ou `return;` quando o retorno é void) em:
- `updateSettings`, `createLocation`, `updateCategoryAlert`, `updateCategoryName`, `deleteCategory`, `deleteLocation`
- `createProductBatch`, `updateProductBatch`, `deleteProductBatch`, `markAsWaste`, `adjustBatchQuantity`
- `createSupplier`, `createSupplierOrder`, `updateSupplierOrderStatus`, `receiveSupplierOrderToStock`, `sendSupplierOrderEmail`
- `createProductTemplate`, `upsertTenantEmailConnection`, `deleteTenantEmailConnection`

Assim, em sessão demo nenhuma alteração é persistida.

### 3. **Label "Modo demonstração"**
- **`lib/demo-client.ts`**: Helpers de cliente para o cookie de demo (`getIsDemoFromCookie()`).
- **`components/main-nav.tsx`**: Leitura do cookie no cliente; exibição de um badge "Modo demonstração" (vermelho discreto) no canto superior direito e no menu mobile.
- **Traduções**: `nav.demoMode` em pt-PT e en.

### 4. **Tutorial ao entrar em demo**
- **`components/tour/tour-context.tsx`**: `useEffect` que, se o cookie de demo estiver presente, remove `tamiini_tour_seen` do `localStorage` e chama `openTour()` após 300 ms. O onboarding começa sempre do início em cada entrada em modo demonstração.

Fluxo final: o utilizador clica em "Ver demonstração" na landing → entra na demo (conta reset + dados de seed) → é redirecionado para `/hoje` → vê "Modo demonstração" no topo → o tour inicia automaticamente; todas as ações de escrita são ignoradas em sessão demo.

<user_query>
Please fix the tutorial behaviour, because it is currently starting automatically in all accounts and is affecting real users.

The intended behaviour should be exactly this:

1. Real user accounts
- When a user enters a new account/PIN for the first time, the tutorial should start automatically once
- After that first time, the tutorial must NOT start automatically again
- From then on, the tutorial should only open if the user manually clicks the tutorial/help button

2. Demo account
- Every time a user clicks "Ver demonstração", they should enter the demo account
- The demo account must always reset to its initial dataset
- Every time the demo is opened, the tutorial must start automatically from the beginning
- Changes made in demo must never be saved or affect future demo sessions

3. Critical fix needed now
- At the moment, the tutorial is incorrectly starting automatically in all accounts, including real client accounts
- Restore the normal behaviour for real users immediately
- Make sure real user accounts are never stuck in the tutorial
- Make sure the tutorial can always be skipped or exited safely

4. Important
- Do not change the normal functioning of the rest of the app
- Do not affect real user data
- Do not change the existing tutorial content or design
- Only fix the logic of when the tutorial should automatically start

In summary:
- Real account first time with new PIN → tutorial starts once
- Real account after that → tutorial only opens manually
- Demo account → tutorial always starts on entry, and data always resets
</user_query>

If existing accounts previously had the global key set, they might auto-open, which aligns with the requirement to start once on the first login with a new PIN.
